message:
The other night, we experienced a surprise blackout. Just as I was settling down with my favorite show, poof—darkness! After a few startled moments, I fumbled around for our trusty flashlight and then grabbed the portable power bank to keep our phones charged. I dug out the lanterns too, which made the living room feel cozy instead of creepy.

Then came the best part: our family group chat lit up with messages. Everyone was sharing their own blackout stories—my sister reminisced about the time she tried to cook in the dark (spoiler: it did not end well), and my dad sent a hilarious meme about camping indoors. It turned into a mini party, with everyone sending funny photos of their makeshift setups.

It reminded me how important it is to have a few backup plans in place for moments like these. Staying connected and cozy can turn an unexpected outage into a fun memory. 

Have you ever had a fun experience during a power outage? I'd love to hear your stories! This little refresher helped too!
